senses.definition: A misspelling or playful variant of 'rhyming', referring to words that have a similar ending sound.
examples: The author notes many rymming patterns in the poem, intentionally using playful sounds.

senses.definition: To compose or identify words that have the same ending sounds; to rhyme.
examples: She enjoys rymming lines to create a musical effect.
The lyrics rymming the chorus with the verses impressed the crowd.
